name: tokenbbq
description: Visualize token usage and costs across all major AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Amp, Pi
author: offbyone1

scripts.build: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && tsdown && node -e "require('fs').renameSync('dist/index.mjs','dist/index.js')"
scripts.dev: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && node --import tsx src/index.ts
scripts.build:sidecar: node scripts/inline-wasm.mjs && node scripts/inline-dashboard-icon.mjs && node scripts/build-sidecar.mjs
scripts.widget:dev: node scripts/build-sidecar.mjs --skip-if-no-bun && npm run --prefix widget tauri dev
scripts.widget:build: npm run build && npm run build:sidecar && npm run --prefix widget tauri build
